manifests.contents:
[package]
name = "zero2prod"
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.8"
config = "0.15.24"
dotenvy = "0.15"
tracing = "0.1"
tracing-bunyan-formatter = "0.3"
tracing-log = "0.2"

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4"
features = ["clock"]
default-features = false

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.sqlx]
version = "0.9"
features = ["runtime-tokio", "tls-rustls", "macros", "postgres", "uuid", "chrono", "migrate"]
default-features = false

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1"
features = ["macros", "rt-multi-thread"]

[dependencies.tower-http]
version = "0.6"
features = ["trace"]

[dependencies.tracing-subscriber]
version = "0.3"
features = ["registry", "env-filter"]

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "1"
features = ["v4"]

[dev-dependencies]
reqwest = "0.12"

[[bin]]
path = "src/main.rs"
name = "zero2prod"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []

[[test]]
path = "tests/api/main.rs"
name = "api"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "zero2prod"
edition = "2024"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]
